sealing.title: Seal the Scarlet King using Banishing Chains — reduce Manifestation below 500 before attempting

manifestation_low.title: Manage Manifestation to below 500 — avoid Nether time and stop Scarlet Cultist chanting near your base

subtitle.text: The Scarlet King cannot be killed. Banishing Chains seal it. The seal requires Manifestation below 500. Time it correctly.

description: CH.12 · THE BANISHING CHAINS
▸ The Scarlet King cannot be damaged.
This is not a bug.
It is unkillable by design.
The Banishing Chains are the solution.
The Manifestation meter is the precondition.
Get Manifestation below 500 before trying.
◈ MANIFESTATION SYSTEM
└ Manifestation meter: rises with Nether time,
Scarlet Cultist activity, proximity to Storm
└ High Manifestation: Scarlet King gains new abilities,
Cultist spawn rate increases, bossbar intensifies
└ Reduce Manifestation:
→ Leave the Nether (stops passive Nether accumulation)
→ Kill Scarlet Cultists before they finish chanting
→ Time your Banishing Chains use between Cultist waves
◈ BANISHING CHAINS — HOW TO USE
└ Craft Banishing Chains (check JEI for recipe)
└ Manifestation must be below 500 when chains are used
└ Attempt the seal: use chains on the Scarlet King
└ Successful seal: the King is bound but not destroyed
It remains bound until Ch17 resolution
└ If Manifestation too high: chains break on contact
Lower Manifestation and try again
◈ SCARLET KING — UNKILLABLE LOGIC
└ The King is a Manifestor that has become real
└ Direct damage does not register
(confirmed — not a difficulty setting)
└ Banishing Chains don't destroy the idea
They contain the physical presence
└ The Cursed Eye requires the King's presence
during the Manifestor Trap — bind AFTER the Eye
▸ Banishing Chains are not a weapon.
They are an argument that takes physical form.
The argument is: you are real enough to hold.
The Scarlet King did not expect to be held.
That is the only vulnerability the chains needed.
▶ Seal the Scarlet King with Banishing Chains [check]
▶ Reduce Manifestation below 500 first [check]
◇ After sealing: Cultist spawns stop.
The Storm is still at X:0 Z:0.
The King is bound. The Storm is not.
Destroy the Storm after the seal.
In that order.
